title: PropertySG Insights — Joe Tay
description: Plain-English guides on Singapore property: selling, renting, valuation, regulations.

items.title: HDB Valuation Explained: How Singapore Agents Actually Price Your Flat
items.summary: Valuation, asking price, offer price — three different numbers most HDB sellers confuse. How agents triangulate URA, SRX, and recent transactions to price your flat honestly.
items.content_text: Valuation, asking price, offer price — three different numbers most HDB sellers confuse. How agents triangulate URA, SRX, and recent transactions to price your flat honestly.

items.title: How Long Does It Take to Sell an HDB Flat in Singapore? (2026 Timeline)
items.summary: A realistic week-by-week breakdown of selling your HDB flat in Singapore — from listing launch to key handover. Written by a CEA-registered advisor.
items.content_text: A realistic week-by-week breakdown of selling your HDB flat in Singapore — from listing launch to key handover. Written by a CEA-registered advisor.

items.title: 2% Commission: What Your Singapore Property Agent Actually Does For It
items.summary: Singapore property agents charge 2% for sales — but what exactly does that cover? The full breakdown of work done behind the scenes, what's included vs extra, and when cheaper agents cost you more.
items.content_text: Singapore property agents charge 2% for sales — but what exactly does that cover? The full breakdown of work done behind the scenes, what's included vs extra, and when cheaper agents cost you more.

items.title: Selling HDB After MOP: The 5-Step Timeline With CPF & HDB Paperwork
items.summary: Just crossed your 5-year MOP and thinking of selling? The 5 steps from eligibility check to keys — including CPF refund, paperwork, and the mistakes BTO owners make on their first resale.
